Enabled.Name: Enable WoD Pretty Theme
Enabled.Hint: Turn the dark/modern restyling on or off. When off, the default wod5e look is used.

AccentMode.Name: Accent color mode
AccentMode.Hint: How accent colors are chosen. Per-splat keeps each splat's identity; Unified uses a single crimson accent everywhere (Progeny style); Neutral uses a muted, most-minimal accent.

Choices.splat: Per-splat (Vampire crimson, Werewolf green, Hunter amber)

StyleChrome.Name: Also restyle Foundry interface
StyleChrome.Hint: Apply the theme to the Foundry chrome too (sidebar, chat, dialogs, windows). Turn off to theme only the wod5e sheets.
